title: Writing cookies is security-sensitive
description: Using cookies is security-sensitive. It has led in the past to the following vulnerabilities: Attackers can use widely-available tools to read cookies. Any sensitive information they may contain will be exposed.
recommendation: Ensure proper security measures when writing cookies: use HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite attributes; avoid storing sensitive data in cookies; implement proper input validation.

checks.message: Writing cookies is security-sensitive - ensure proper security measures are implemented
